title: Crispy Buttermilk Fried Chicken
description: A classic Southern dish, this recipe features crispy fried chicken marinated in a creamy buttermilk mixture.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine buttermilk and chicken pieces. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
2. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, crispy seasoning, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
4. Remove the chicken from the buttermilk, allowing any excess to drip off.
5. Dredge the chicken pieces in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
6. Carefully place the chicken in the hot oil and fry for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
7. Remove the chicken from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
